programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: When a terrorist threatens to bomb the Miss United States pageant, the FBI rushes to find a female agent to go undercover as a contestant. Unfortunately, Gracie is the only female FBI agent who can "look the part" despite her complete lack of refinement and femininity. She prides herself in being "just one of the boys" and is horrified at the idea of becoming a girly girl.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Proposal
programme.desc: Faced with deportation to her native Canada, high-powered book editor Margaret Tate says she's engaged to marry Andrew Paxton, her hapless assistant. Andrew agrees to the charade, but imposes a few conditions of his own, including flying to Alaska to meet his eccentric family. With a suspicious immigration official always lurking nearby, Margaret and Andrew must stick to their wedding plan despite numerous mishaps.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: FBI Special Agent Sarah Ashburn (Sandra Bullock) is a methodical investigator with a long-standing reputation for excellence -- and arrogance. In contrast, foul-mouthed, hot-tempered detective Shannon Mullins (Melissa McCarthy) goes with her gut instincts and street smarts to remove criminals from the streets of Boston. Sparks fly when these polar opposites have to work together to capture a drug lord, but in the process, they become the last thing anyone expected -- buddies.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: Nikki Glaser moves back to her hometown of St. Louis, where she rekindles a relationship with her ex-boyfriend, Chris; Nikki's mom lends a hand decorating Nikki's bedroom with pink walls & posters of pop stars.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: While Nikki performs a sold-out show in St. Louis, a prank gone wrong has the police at her parents' house looking for Nikki; Chris and Nikki go on a date, but it seems that Chris loves someone else more than Nikki.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: While planning a shower for her pregnant sister, Nikki starts envisioning children in her own future; Nikki decides to finally pursue her goal of becoming a musician and records her first single.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: With Chris and her parents sitting next to one another at her upcoming show in Chicago, Nikki fears her act will embarrass them as she shares intimate details about her sex life on stage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: After finally consummating her relationship with Chris in Chicago, Nikki wants to have bigger conversations about their future, but Chris deflects; Nikki faces her singing insecurities and performs live for the first time.

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: Nikki feels her relationship with Chris isn't progressing the way she wants it to, so she decides to explore other options; she meets a guy who has all the traits she's looking for.

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: Nikki's dislike of nature and activities is challenged by a visit to her parents' river cabin; Nikki and Chris go to couples' therapy even though they aren't a couple.

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?

programme.desc: Kristin struggles to maintain control as the rivalry between Brittainy and Shannon continues to cause chaos at the office; Jay blindsides Kristin when he announces he wants to buy a new house; Shannon and Gurney's relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: Very Cavallari
programme.desc: Kristin's business is booming, with brand new Uncommon James offices, a wildly growing staff, and massive plans for expansion; Brittainy's work life's going great, but her relationship with Stone is on the rocks.

programme.title: Very Cavallari
programme.desc: Kristin heads to Chicago to meet up with her friend Biegs and check out spaces for a potential second UJ store; finding out if she's going to get her dream space or not, however, has her on edge.

programme.desc: Kristin still mourns her failed friendship with Kelly; Brittainy is newly single, but is shocked when she is late getting her period and fears that she might be pregnant with Stone's baby.

programme.title: Honestly Cavallari: The Headline Tour
programme.desc: Kristin Cavallari is fed up with clickbait headlines so she's taking matters into her own hands; first in Atlanta with guest Kim Zolciak, where they discuss what it's like to be a mom while going through a public divorce.

programme.title: Honestly Cavallari: The Headline Tour
programme.desc: Night two of the tour is a big one for Kristin as she gears up for the Windy City and a high school reunion like no other with her friends from Laguna Beach; the old classmates catch up and spill some 20+ year secrets.

programme.title: Honestly Cavallari: The Headline Tour
programme.sub-title: Too Hot to Handle the Headlines
programme.desc: Kristin has to quickly regroup for her second show of the night in her hometown of Chicago; Harry Jowsey helps Kristin reset the vibe; a blast from Kristin's past makes her question why she's been drawn to certain men.

programme.title: Honestly Cavallari: The Headline Tour
programme.desc: On her day off in Chicago, Kristin checks in on her Uncommon James store followed by a dinner with friends that takes a turn; her entourage heads to Boston where Camille Kostek joins her on stage.

programme.title: Honestly Cavallari: The Headline Tour
programme.desc: Kristin's alleged party girl ways lead to some charming headlines with Bravo's Craig and Austen; Kristin attempts to clear up the gossip with the "Southern Charm" cast in Boston.

programme.title: Honestly Cavallari: The Headline Tour
programme.desc: Kristin's headline tour comes to an end at her biggest show yet in New York; a low-energy crowd leaves Kristin and her final guests, Brie and Nikki Bella, wrestling to amp up the audience.
When a famous mystery writer dies, Athena, Bobby and the 118 respond to the chaos caused by a citywide manhunt for buried treasure the author left behind.

programme.desc: The members of the 118 make calls to save a bridezilla at a disastrous wedding; Hen plays medical detective when her mother falls ill; Eddie and Christopher receive a visit from Carla; Athena uncovers a secret Bobby has been hiding.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.desc: A series of ransomware threats leads to emergencies for the 118, including a helicopter crash at a hospital and an air traffic control tower system failure; the case of the realtor serial rapist goes to trial.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: America loved Bob Barker, but few knew about the scandal behind the scenes at The Price is Right; former employees break decades of silence, exposing a hidden affair and secrets that reveal a darker side of television's most beloved game show icon.
